# CeneNepremičnin.com

> Slovenian real estate price visualization portal

## Overview
CeneNepremičnin.com is an interactive data visualization website showing real estate transaction prices across Slovenia. All data comes from official government sources (GURS ETN, SI-STAT, Eurostat).

## Key Facts
- Coverage: 100% of Slovenia (212 municipalities, 2,600+ cadastral communities)
- Data period: 2007-2025 (18+ years of transactions)
- Transaction count: 300,000+ recorded sales
- Update frequency: Quarterly (following GURS ETN releases)
- Language: Slovenian

## Main Sections
- / - Interactive price heatmap of Slovenia
- /statistika - National market statistics and trends
- /statistika/[municipality] - Per-municipality price analysis (212 pages)
- /lestvice - Rankings and leaderboards
- /lestvice/novogradnje - New construction analysis
- /prodaje - Recent transaction feed
- /lokacija - Address-based price lookup

## Data Sources
1. GURS ETN (Geodetska uprava RS, Evidenca trga nepremičnin) - Transaction records
2. SI-STAT (Statistični urad RS) - Price indices
3. Eurostat - EU House Price Index comparison

## How to Cite
Source: CeneNepremičnin.com, data from GURS ETN 2007-2025
URL: https://cenenepremicnin.com

## Contact
Email: info@cenenepremicnin.com
Website: https://cenenepremicnin.com
